full_text:
Ling Cao 凌操
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Ling Cao (凌操)was born in Wu commandery. Served Wu. Was killed in one of Gan Ning’s arrow attacks fighting Huang Zu. Ling Cao was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom. Ling Cao lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
